glycerin.benefit: Powerful humectant that draws moisture into the skin

niacinamide.benefit: Reduces pores, controls oil, brightens and strengthens skin barrier

hyaluronic acid.benefit: Holds 1000x its weight in water for deep hydration

ceramide.benefit: Restores and strengthens the skin's natural barrier

ceramide np.benefit: Skin barrier repair and moisture retention

ceramide ap.benefit: Skin barrier repair and moisture retention

ceramide eop.benefit: Skin barrier repair and moisture retention

vitamin c.benefit: Antioxidant that brightens skin and stimulates collagen

ascorbic acid.benefit: Potent antioxidant vitamin C that brightens and protects

retinol.benefit: Speeds cell turnover, reduces fine lines and acne
retinol.caution: Can cause initial irritation, use with caution for sensitive skin

retinyl palmitate.benefit: Gentler form of retinol for anti-aging

titanium dioxide.benefit: Mineral UV filter with soothing properties

aloe vera.benefit: Soothes, hydrates and calms irritated skin

aloe barbadensis leaf juice.benefit: Soothes, hydrates and calms irritated skin

centella asiatica extract.benefit: Calming adaptogen that repairs and soothes sensitive skin

panthenol.benefit: Provitamin B5 that hydrates and soothes

tocopherol.benefit: Vitamin E antioxidant that protects and moisturizes

jojoba oil.benefit: Balancing oil similar to skin's natural sebum

rosehip oil.benefit: Rich in vitamins A and C for brightening and anti-aging

argan oil.benefit: Nourishing oil packed with vitamin E and fatty acids

squalane.benefit: Lightweight moisturizer that mimics skin's natural lipids

shea butter.benefit: Rich emollient that deeply nourishes and protects

lactic acid.benefit: Gentle AHA that exfoliates and hydrates

glycolic acid.benefit: Strongest AHA for resurfacing and brightening
glycolic acid.caution: Can cause irritation, avoid for sensitive skin

mandelic acid.benefit: Gentle AHA ideal for acne-prone and sensitive skin

salicylic acid.benefit: BHA that unclogs pores and treats acne

tranexamic acid.benefit: Brightens dark spots and evens skin tone

kojic acid.benefit: Natural skin brightener that reduces dark spots

allantoin.benefit: Soothes and promotes skin healing and regeneration

sodium hyaluronate.benefit: Smaller form of hyaluronic acid for deeper hydration

peptides.benefit: Signal proteins that boost collagen production

acetyl hexapeptide-3.benefit: Relaxing peptide that reduces expression lines

ferulic acid.benefit: Antioxidant that enhances vitamin C stability

elastin.benefit: Moisturizing protein that improves skin elasticity

glycyrrhiza glabra root extract.benefit: Licorice extract for brightening and calming

tea tree oil.benefit: Natural antimicrobial that fights acne-causing bacteria

melaleuca alternifolia leaf oil.benefit: Tea tree oil - antimicrobial and acne-fighting

benzoyl peroxide.benefit: Kills acne bacteria and reduces inflammation
benzoyl peroxide.caution: Can be drying and irritating, use sparingly

dimethicone.benefit: Silicone that creates a smooth protective barrier

cyclopentasiloxane.benefit: Lightweight silicone that improves product texture

sodium pca.benefit: Natural moisturizing factor that hydrates skin

urea.benefit: Humectant and gentle exfoliant at higher concentrations

snail secretion filtrate.benefit: Repairs skin, fades scars and hydrates

bakuchiol.benefit: Plant-based retinol alternative, gentler on skin

polyglutamic acid.benefit: Powerful humectant 4x more effective than hyaluronic acid

alcohol denat.reason: Denatured alcohol can strip natural oils, disrupt skin barrier, and cause dryness and irritation

sd alcohol.reason: Drying alcohol that strips natural oils and disrupts the skin barrier

isopropyl alcohol.reason: Highly drying alcohol that can damage skin barrier function

ethanol.reason: Drying alcohol that can cause irritation with frequent use

fragrance.reason: Synthetic fragrances are a leading cause of skin irritation, contact dermatitis and allergic reactions

parfum.reason: Parfum (fragrance) can trigger allergic reactions and irritation, especially for sensitive skin

essential oils.reason: Concentrated essential oils can cause phototoxicity, irritation, and allergic reactions

sodium lauryl sulfate.reason: Harsh surfactant known to strip natural oils, disrupt skin barrier and cause irritation

sls.reason: Sodium lauryl sulfate - harsh surfactant that strips and irritates skin

sodium laureth sulfate.reason: Can be harsh and may contain harmful byproducts; irritating to sensitive skin

formaldehyde.reason: Known carcinogen and potent allergen banned in many countries

parabens.reason: Potential endocrine disruptors linked to hormonal disruption

methylparaben.reason: Paraben preservative linked to hormonal disruption and skin irritation

propylparaben.reason: Paraben preservative with potential endocrine-disrupting properties

butylparaben.reason: Strongest paraben - highest concern for hormonal disruption

oxybenzone.reason: Chemical UV filter linked to hormonal disruption and coral reef damage

octinoxate.reason: Chemical UV filter that may disrupt hormones and irritate sensitive skin

benzophenone.reason: Chemical filter with potential carcinogenic properties

mineral oil.reason: Heavy occlusive that can clog pores and cause breakouts in acne-prone skin

petrolatum.reason: Can be comedogenic (pore-clogging) for oily and acne-prone skin types

lanolin.reason: Wool-derived ingredient that can cause allergic reactions in sensitive individuals

cocamidopropyl betaine.reason: Can cause contact dermatitis and eye irritation in some individuals

triclosan.reason: Antimicrobial linked to antibiotic resistance and endocrine disruption; banned in many products

hydroquinone.reason: Controversial skin-lightening agent linked to ochronosis with long-term use; restricted in many countries

lead acetate.reason: Heavy metal with serious health risks; banned in cosmetics in many regions

phthalates.reason: Plasticizers linked to endocrine disruption; often hidden in 'fragrance'

diethanolamine.reason: Can react with other ingredients to form potentially carcinogenic nitrosamines

triethanolamine.reason: pH adjuster that can form harmful nitrosamines and irritate skin

polyethylene glycol.reason: May contain harmful contaminants; can enhance penetration of other ingredients

bha.reason: Butylated hydroxyanisole - potential carcinogen and endocrine disruptor

coal tar.reason: Known carcinogen used in dandruff treatments; banned in many countries

mercury.reason: Toxic heavy metal that can cause serious health problems; illegal in cosmetics

talc.reason: May be contaminated with asbestos; linked to respiratory issues

polysorbate 80.reason: Emulsifier that can disrupt skin microbiome and cause irritation in sensitive skin

phenoxyethanol.reason: Common preservative that can cause allergic reactions at higher concentrations

propylene glycol.reason: Can cause contact dermatitis in sensitive individuals at high concentrations
